experiences.title: Assistant Kit Manager
experiences.description:
One of three Kitman working for WBAFC.

Working for all players and staff associated with WBA's: first team, U21's and U18's.

experiences.title: Kit Manager
experiences.description:
Whilst self employed I have worked for companies such as:

- The FA 
- The FAW 

Working for squads at competitions and training camps such as:

- England's Men's Senior team (Training camp pre-world cup 2014)
- England's Men's U20's (U20s World Cup Qualifiers) 
- Welsh Senior Ladies team (Algarve Cup)

And more.
